Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 35 

LDGNG_MEALS_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Lodging or Meals Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the other non-individual service provider 
category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: LDGNG_MEALS_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: LDGNG_MEALS_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
